headline: Tennessee, Georgia Impose Crypto ATM Bans Effective Immediately

article.title: Crypto ATM bans, restrictions now in effect in Tennessee and Georgia
article.summary: Crypto ATM's are fast disappearing in the US as Tennessee’s ban goes into effect today while operators in Minnesota have until Aug. 1 to comply with a similar law.

headline: Binance Adopts Anchorage Digital $1B Off-Exchange Settlement

article.title: Anchorage Digital brings off-exchange settlement to Binance
article.summary: The integration addresses one of the biggest obstacles keeping institutional capital on the sidelines of crypto markets: exchange counterparty risk.

headline: $500M Care Bears Deal Sparks M&A Frenzy

article.title: Dealmakers 'Unlock the Magic' with Care Bears Sale
article.summary: Jeff Collins, Managing Partner at Cloverlay, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." IVEST Consumer Partners and Cloverlay announced the sale of Care Bears to Authentic Brands Group. They discuss the deal and the value of intellectual property. (Source: Bloomberg)
